title: ‘John Wick’ Video Game in the Works
content:
ByJennifer Maas

TV Business Writer

A “John Wick” video game is in the works from Saber Interactive and Lionsgate with star Keanu Reeves reprising his role for the single-player third-person action title.

Described as a AAA video game “tailored for mature audiences,” the title is currently in development for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X and PC with “John Wick” film franchise director Chad Stahelski and Reeves involved.

The untitled “John Wick” game will combine John Wick’s “unparalleled, adrenaline-fueled ‘gun-fu’ fighting style with Saber’s proven reputation for creating thrilling gaming experiences that leave players craving more.”

The game will feature an “original gameplay narrative set in the ‘John Wick’ timeline years before the Impossible Task. It will expand on the franchise’s lore during that time with familiar characters fans already know and love, as well as compelling new ones created specifically for this production.”

“I can’t wait for fans to step into the shoes of John Wick and explore the multi-dimensional world of The High Table,” stated Jenefer Brown, President of Global Products & Experiences at Lionsgate. “We are collaborating closely with Saber’s dedicated team to develop a game that captures the unparalleled action, brand-defining fight choreography, immersive world-building, and authenticity of the films.”

“John Wick is one of the most iconic characters in action film history. Saber is honored to be working alongside Chad, Keanu and the Lionsgate team in a true collaboration to bring the world of Wick to life in a AAA game,” said Matthew Karch, CEO at Saber Interactive.

Watch the trailer for the untitled “John Wick” video game via the video below.
title_zh: 《約翰·威克(John Wick)》電玩遊戲正在開發中。
content_zh:
由珍妮佛·馬斯(Jennifer Maas)報導

電視商業撰稿人

一款《約翰·威克》(John Wick) 的電子遊戲正在由Saber Interactive和Lionsgate製作，明星基努·里維斯(Keanu Reeves)將重返角色，參與這款單人第三人稱動作遊戲。

這款遊戲被描述為一款“為成熟觀眾量身打造的AAA級電子遊戲”，目前正在為PlayStation 5、Xbox Series X和PC開發，並有《約翰·威克》電影系列導演查德·斯塔赫斯基(Chad Stahelski)和基努·里維斯參與。

這款未命名的《約翰·威克》遊戲將結合約翰·威克的“無與倫比、充滿刺激的‘槍鬥’戰鬥風格，以及Saber在創造令人興奮的遊戲體驗方面的良好聲譽，讓玩家渴望更多。”

遊戲將呈現一個“原創的遊戲敘事，設定在《約翰·威克》時間線上，距離不可能任務(Impossible Task)數年之前。它將擴展該系列在那段時間的背景故事，包含粉絲們已經熟悉和喜愛的角色，以及為這部作品特別創造的引人入勝的新角色。”

“我迫不及待想讓粉絲們化身約翰·威克，探索高桌(The High Table)的多維世界，”Lionsgate全球產品與體驗總裁珍妮弗·布朗(Jenefer Brown)表示。“我們正與Saber的專業團隊密切合作，開發一款能捕捉無與倫比的動作、品牌定義的戰鬥編排、沉浸式世界建設和電影真實性的遊戲。”

“約翰·威克是動作電影歷史上最具標誌性的角色之一。Saber很榮幸能與查德、基努和Lionsgate團隊真誠合作，將威克的世界帶入AAA遊戲中，”Saber Interactive的首席執行官馬修·卡赫(Matthew Karch)說。

請透過下方視頻觀看未命名的《約翰·威克》電子遊戲的預告片。

電視商業撰稿人
